title: elaphoglossum perangustum
intro: Elaphoglossum perangustum is a species of fern belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum perangustum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of Elaphoglossum perangustum are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
